data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The requirement specifies that field scopes must include booking-level, customer profile, service configuration, and provider profile. However, the linked use case only provides evidence for custom fields related to booking forms without confirming their application across all required scopes. This indicates a gap in the evidence provided, as it does not demonstrate coverage for all specified field scopes.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming field scopes: customer profile, service configuration, and provider profile.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
